description: Audits medical bills for duplicate charges, No Surprises Act violations, and generates dispute letters.

metadata.label: Bill Ingestion
metadata.description: Ingest and parse the patient's itemized medical bill.

metadata.label: Duplicate Charge Audit
metadata.description: Scan bill line items for duplicate or unbundled charges.

params.llm_prompt: Analyze the following medical bill for duplicate or unbundled charges: {bill_summary}

metadata.label: NSA Violation Audit
metadata.description: Check for No Surprises Act violations such as out-of-network balance billing.

params.llm_prompt: Check the following bill for No Surprises Act violations: {bill_summary}

metadata.label: Violations Found?
metadata.description: Determine if any billing errors or violations were identified.

metadata.label: Generate Dispute Letter
metadata.description: Draft a formal dispute letter citing identified billing errors and applicable regulations.

params.llm_prompt: Draft a dispute letter for the following billing violations: {bill_summary}

metadata.label: Flag as Clean
metadata.description: Mark the bill as reviewed with no actionable findings.

metadata.label: Navigator Review
metadata.description: Hand off audit results to a Community Equity Navigator for final action.
